title: Pink Glass Vase for Flowers, Ribbed Vase, Flower Vases for Bouquet, Modern Glass Vases for Living Room, Bedroom, Dining Table, Office, Shelf, 20CM
features: Elegant Ribbed Vase: Perfect for displaying flower bouquets, this glass vase adds a touch of sophistication and simplicity. Ideal for the living room, dining table, mantelpiece, coffee table, or porch

Exceptional Craftsmanship: Made from 100% premium soda-lime glass, this ribbed vase is sturdy, leak-proof, and easy to clean. Expertly handcrafted, its textured finish adds a touch of modern elegance to any space

Glass Vase for Flowers: Featuring a tall, elegant design with a wide opening, this clear vase is perfect for long-stemmed blooms like roses, lilies, and gladioli, adding structure and style to any space
Distinctive Design: With or without flowers, this uniquely shaped glass vase adds beauty to any space. Perfect for modern, minimalist, boho, or classic interiors

Perfect Gift: This handmade glass vase is a stunning gift for friends and family, perfect for home décor, weddings, housewarmings, and businesses. Ideal for occasions like birthdays, Christmas, New Year, Thanksgiving, Valentine’s Day, and Mother’s Day
description: Product Description SMOOTH EDGE Designed with a smooth edge to ensure comfort RIBBED TEXTURE Expertly crafted with a ribbed surface for an elegant THICK BOTTOM A sturdy, thick base adds stability, preventing leaks and slips OFFICE Contemporary Décor to Elevate Your Home DINNER ROOM Flower Vases For Your Room COFFEE TABLE A Stylish Gift for Any Home
